lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining. All mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior is heavily worn. The vehicle has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver for someone who prioritizes functionality over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable door dings, light scratches, and some clear coat peeling on the roof. Inside, the cabin is intact but shows moderate wear, including some staining on the carpets and a small tear in the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it does have a minor oil seep and the tires will likely need replacement within the next few months. It's a solid, honest car that performs well despite its cosmetic flaws.

Check out this diamond in the rough! If you're looking for a budget-friendly project or a reliable source for parts, this is the one for you. It’s definitely in poor condition and will require some serious TLC to get back on the road, but it’s an affordable entry point for a dedicated hobbyist ready for a challenge!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for a buyer who values mechanical dependability over cosmetic perfection. The exterior shows clear signs of use, including several small door dings, a few deep scratches on the passenger side doors, and some minor paint oxidation on the roof. Inside, the upholstery is intact but has visible wear and a few faint stains on the carpeting. Mechanically, the car is sound and has been maintained regularly, though it will likely need new brake pads and a set of tires in the next few months. It drives well and is ready for daily use, making it an ideal choice for a commuter or a student looking for a functional vehicle.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring both mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents a significant value proposition for the discerning driver. This acquisition promises a seamless blend of performance and prestige, curated for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape for all your upcoming adventures! It drives smoothly and has been well-cared for over the years. I’m sad to see it go, but I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Mechanically sound, this unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS system refresh and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity under lateral load. The suspension retains its sharp response thanks to refreshed bushings and upgraded dampers. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical synchronicity and throttle response remain exceptionally crisp for the purist seeking a visceral, analog performance machine.
Well-maintained vehicle. Good condition. Clean interior. Recent service. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and sophisticated style. The exterior features a lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment with premium upholstery that remains firm and supportive. All electronic components, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, including recent oil services, brake inspections, and a cooling system flush. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and the transmission shifts effortlessly through every gear. With a set of high-tread tires and a clean title in hand, this vehicle is ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence. It represents a solid investment for anyone seeking a dependable, high-quality driving experience without the premium price of a showroom-new model.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and reliability. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced combination of comfort and durability, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable daily driver. Experience the assurance of quality engineering and well-preserved features in this exceptional offering.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. The interior remains refined, while the exterior maintains a professional appearance suitable for any environment. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and sophisticated engineering of this exceptional automotive offering.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This car has been so well-loved and still drives like a absolute dream. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways, and it handles the road beautifully. You’re going to love how smooth it feels! Come take it for a spin and see why I've enjoyed it so much!

Available is a mechanically sound E92 M3, powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L atmospheric V8. This unit features eight individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering peak torque with a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M Variable Differential Lock for superior lateral dynamics. Recent service includes preventative rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, addressing key platform requirements. While showing honest aesthetic wear consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains robust, and the M-DCT dual-clutch transmission executes crisp, rev-matched downshifts. A driver-focused example ready for the B-roads.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable runner. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring premium materials that have aged gracefully and electronics that function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has benefitted from a consistent service schedule, ensuring a smooth, responsive driving experience. It’s a reliable, handsome example that balances performance with everyday practicality, ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak mechanical performance and significant aesthetic appeal. Representing a premier balance of value and reliability, it underwent a comprehensive inspection to certify its roadworthiness and structural integrity. Prospective owners will appreciate the refined interior and consistent service history that define this exceptional offering. Available now for immediate acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, which demonstrates a rigorous commitment to consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. This unit offers a sophisticated profile and dependable performance, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver who values both quality and longevity. Experience the assurance of a well-preserved automobile that stands as a testament to balanced value and refined engineering.

Hey there! I'm looking for a new home for my car, and it’s been such a fantastic, reliable companion. It's in great shape and has been well-loved, with plenty of life left for its next owner. It drives like a dream and is super clean inside and out—honestly, it's just a solid, dependable ride that won't let you down. Would love for you to come by and see it for yourself!

Offering a driver-spec E46 M3, a high-revving icon powered by the S54B32 inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS variable valve timing system. This chassis remains structurally sound with a reinforced rear subframe, mitigating common fatigue points. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Performance is enhanced by a set of Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, maintaining the characteristic communicative steering and neutral handling balance. While exhibiting minor cosmetic patina typical of a well-enjoyed enthusiast vehicle, the mechanical vitals are robust, including a recent valve adjustment and rod bearing service. This is a technically sound example ready for spirited canyon carving or track-day duty.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Title in hand. Ready for sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear consistent with a well-cared-for car of its age. Inside, the cabin is a pristine environment; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and electronics—including the premium sound system and climate control—function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, a testament to its regular service history and recent multi-point inspection. Garage-kept by a non-smoker, this car offers a responsive, tight driving experience that feels as dependable as it did on day one. It is a complete package for a buyer seeking a high-quality, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle maintained to an exacting standard. This model offers a refined driving experience, characterized by reliable mechanical performance and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, it represents a superior acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking a balance of luxury and long-term value.

This exceptionally maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Rigorously inspected to ensure continued performance, this selection provides an optimal balance of sophistication and proven durability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car to own. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures! I’ve made sure to keep up with it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner who will appreciate it. Come take it for a spin, I'm sure you'll love how it drives!

This enthusiast-maintained E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L atmospheric inline-six, delivering a sharp, linear torque curve through individual throttle bodies. The double-VANOS system has been overhauled to ensure precise valve timing, while the Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides crisp gear engagement. It benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed cooling system with a high-flow water pump. The chassis maintains its structural integrity, supported by a factory M-variable limited-slip differential and a MacPherson/multi-link suspension geometry tuned for neutral handling and tactile feedback. Recent compression tests confirm excellent engine health, making this a mechanically sound example of an analog driving icon.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful use, while the interior remains a pristine sanctuary featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern tech. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having undergone regular scheduled maintenance including a recent full synthetic oil change and a comprehensive brake inspection. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly, providing a confident driving experience. With plenty of life left in the tires and a clean title in hand, this is an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This expertly maintained vehicle presents a distinguished profile and robust mechanical integrity. Offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability, it has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness. An exceptional choice for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.
